name: sentinel-agent-payment-boundary-preflight
description: Deterministically inspect public agent-payment documents and decoded x402 v2 PaymentRequired JSON under explicit safety profiles.
long_description: Two read-only deterministic preflights inspect inline public documents without executing supplied content or fetching requester-controlled URLs. The agent-payment tool performs 11 fixed authority, quote, replay, receipt, wallet-secret, and integrity checks. The x402 tool performs nine structural checks under a pinned, closed-world exact-EVM EIP-3009 Sentinel safety profile; it does not decode headers, evaluate payer policy, verify signatures, settle payments, or verify receipts. Neither tool moves funds or expands payer authority. An optional fixed-scope review is available only through a separate quote-first process.

tools.name: preflight_agent_payment_boundary
tools.description: Inspect one or two inline public documents using 11 deterministic agent-payment boundary checks. No URL fetch, code execution, wallet access, request submission, or payment.

tools.name: preflight_x402_v2_payment_required
tools.description: Inspect one decoded inline x402 v2 PaymentRequired JSON document using nine deterministic checks under the exact-EVM EIP-3009 Sentinel safety profile. No header decoding, URL fetch, wallet access, signature verification, settlement, receipt verification, or payment.
